data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests run — 22/25 pass. 3 failures in test_frontmatter_fields due to awk extraction bug in test (awk '/^---/{c++; if(c==2) exit} c && FNR>200{exit}' produces empty output on macOS awk, making frontmatter field checks unreachable). Gate ordering fix and read-only guard fix applied. Max achievable: 22/25.
